upstreamSupportStatus: officially supported for AWSIM/Autoware users; Robotec states it cannot support and maintain the project for the general community

currentRecommendedRuntime.sourceBasis: Phase 137B local Jazzy rebuild from R2FU/ros2cs sources with Windows ROS2 Jazzy dependency closure
evidence: Developer/87 Phase137B R2FU Jazzy Windows Build Toolchain Closure Evidence.md
Developer/88 Phase137B Jazzy R2FU Windows Build Pitfalls And Validation.md
Developer/72 Phase106110 Joint Unity Windows ROS2 Acceptance Crash Evidence.md
knownCaveats: Runtime artifact is local and not bundled in this adapter package.
WSL2 NAT is diagnostic-only, not a GREEN gate.
ros2 topic list graph snapshots can be intermittent; bidirectional data path is the current gate.

legacyRuntime.evidence: GREEN_WINDOWS_ROS2 / Phase106B GREEN_RTPS_LOCATOR / GREEN_WSL_TO_UNITY_SEDP / BLOCKED_UNITY_TO_WSL_SEDP / BLOCKED_WSL_ROS2_DISCOVERY

packageComposition.sdkAlone: fully usable for normal Foxglove, MCAP, Replay, and FoxRun workflows
packageComposition.adapterAlone: compiles and reports missing runtime gracefully
packageComposition.runtimeAlone: imports runtime files and exposes metadata/diagnostics
packageComposition.sdkPlusAdapterPlusRuntime: enables the full combined Unity2Foxglove workflow
